title: REMOVAL & INSTALLATION

figures_detected.description: Cross-section diagram showing housing and clutch assembly with 16-20 mm measurement dimension indicated from housing surface to electromagnetic clutch end surface
Cross-section diagram showing drive plate and bolt installation location for clutch to drive plate connection from lower side (oil pan)

content_blocks.text: Measure the distance from the end surface of t[he housi]ng to the end surface of the electromagnetic clutch.

items.label: Standard value — distance from housing surface to electromagnetic clutch end surface

steps.text: Connect the drive plate and the electromagnetic clutch assembly from the lower side (oil pan) with four bolts, after assembling the transaxle to the engine.
notes: Tighten the four bolts loosely and then tighten them to the specified torque.

items.label: Tightening torque — Clutch to drive plate bolts
items.condition: Four bolts, clutch to drive plate

content_blocks.text: Tighten the four bolts loosely and then tighten them to the specified torque.

model_notes: Procedure relates to electromagnetic clutch assembly on automatic transaxle. Access from lower side (oil pan) required.
